# Build with Jeremy

> Jeremy Pittman is a Strategic Ops Partner and Fractional COO consultant helping established service businesses ($500K–$5M revenue) scale without chaos. 12 years at Google in operations, programs, and product launches. Top Rated on Upwork with 100% Job Success Score.

## About

Jeremy Pittman helps service businesses remove operational bottlenecks so they can scale without adding headcount or chaos. The core approach: Diagnose the bottleneck → Design the system → Deploy automations and tools → Discipline with documentation and training. He has enabled $5M+ in client ARR and consistently doubled admin output for clients.

Background: 12 years at Google (ops, logistics, product launches at scale). Now full-time consultant working with home services, logistics, staffing, and agency businesses.

## Services

- [Strategic Ops Partner (Retainer)](https://buildwithjeremy.com/services) — Fractional COO support for $500K–$5M service businesses. Ongoing partnership: operating cadence, automations, dashboards, documentation, and training. Best for teams where operations are the bottleneck.

- [2-Week Systems Sprint](https://buildwithjeremy.com/services) — Fast engagement: diagnose the bottleneck, ship 1–2 high-leverage fixes, deliver a 60–90 day roadmap. For smaller teams or a "try before retainer" start.

- [AI Audit & Team Training](https://buildwithjeremy.com/services) — Practical AI adoption: identify where AI can save time this quarter, train the team, implement 1–2 automations. No hype, no theory — just what works now.

- [AI Employee Setup](https://buildwithjeremy.com/ai-employee) — Done-for-you AI assistant configured on a Mac Mini with your tools, brand voice, and workflows. Shipped to your door ready to work 24/7. Specialized setups for agencies.

## AI Employee for Agencies

- [AI Employee for Marketing Agencies](https://buildwithjeremy.com/ai-employee/marketing-agencies) — Automate client reporting, communication triage, and project management workflows.

- [AI Employee for SEO Agencies](https://buildwithjeremy.com/ai-employee/seo-agencies) — Automate link building outreach, rank tracking, and weekly client SEO reports.

- [AI Employee for Social Media Agencies](https://buildwithjeremy.com/ai-employee/social-media-agencies) — Automate content scheduling, engagement monitoring, and analytics reporting.

- [AI Employee for Recruiting Agencies](https://buildwithjeremy.com/ai-employee/recruiting-agencies) — Automate candidate sourcing, outreach, follow-up sequences, and placement tracking.

- Verified consultant for service businesses, agencies, and startups
